title: Kanban Advanced Workflow Overlay Config
description: Project overlay for hermes-kanban-advanced-workflow variable substitution into materialized skill files. Generated by 'hermes kanban-advanced init' or the Kanban-Advanced dashboard tab.

schema_version.description: Overlay config contract version (semver). Must match what validate_config.py accepts.

working_branch.description: Integration branch; orchestrator merges here. Substituted as ${working_branch}.

trigger_branch.description: Optional protected deploy branch agents must not push to. When unset, E009 trigger rules are disabled. Substituted as ${trigger_branch} when set.

policy_profile.description: Governance enforcement level: advisory (warn), balanced (block, default), strict (block + notify). Written to KANBAN_POLICY_PROFILE in .env.

orchestrator_profile.description: Hermes profile for root, gate, and audit cards. Substituted as ${orchestrator_profile}. Validated by preflight and validate_board.sh.

worker_profile.description: Hermes profile for implementation cards. Substituted as ${worker_profile}. Read by validate_board.sh.

preflight_profiles.description: Comma-separated profiles for preflight check. Read by preflight.sh.

coding_agent_binary.description: Headless CLI coding agent binary dispatched by the worker profile. Substituted as ${coding_agent_binary}. Set during init (agent=Cursor, claude=Claude Code, codex=OpenAI Codex, etc.).

bundle_path.description: Path to the plugin root relative to repo root. Used by provision.sh to locate skill source files.

plan_memory_path.description: Repo-relative path for plan memory JSON. Substituted as ${plan_memory_path}.

required_secrets.description: Comma-separated env var names for preflight secret check.

preflight_api_url.description: Health URL for API reachability check; empty skips.

gateway_timeout_seconds.description: Gateway timeout seconds for commit-cadence advice.

skills_output_path.description: Where provision.sh writes materialized skill files. Defaults to ~/.hermes/skills/kanban-advanced.

hermes_home_hint.description: Documentation-only operator note for HERMES_HOME; not substituted into skills.

escalation_max_attempts.description: Per-level retry thresholds before escalation. Read by kanban_escalation_tracker.sh.
